summary: Successfully tested the advanced recurrence feature (Monthly on...) for Hospital Meeting App. All backend API tests passed (13/13). Frontend UI tests passed - 'Monthly on...' option appears, Week/Day selectors appear when selected, all options show correctly, and end-to-end meeting creation works with recurrence fields being persisted to MongoDB correctly.

warnings.issue: React console warning: 'Select is changing from uncontrolled to controlled'. This occurs on lines 318 and 336 where value={formData.recurrence_week_of_month || undefined} pattern is used. Should use empty string instead of null/undefined for controlled Select components.
warnings.impact: No functional impact - just a console warning

critical_code_review_comments: Minor: In MeetingWizardPage.js lines 318 and 336, consider using value={formData.recurrence_week_of_month || ''} instead of || undefined to avoid controlled/uncontrolled warning
seed_data_creation: Test meetings were created during testing with 'TEST_' prefix and cleaned up after tests
context_for_next_testing_agent: Advanced recurrence feature is fully implemented and working. Backend supports recurrence_type='monthly_on' with recurrence_week_of_month (first/second/third/fourth/last) and recurrence_day_of_week (monday-sunday). Frontend Meeting Wizard shows these selectors conditionally when 'Monthly on...' is selected. All CRUD operations work correctly.

backend_api.POST /api/meetings with monthly_on recur: PASS - saves recurrence_week_of_month and recurrence_day_of_week correctly

frontend_ui.End-to-end meeting creation: PASS - meeting created with correct recurrence data persisted to MongoDB
